title: Monkie Mischief
description: ''If these peaches didn't make me inmortal, they'd literally kill me'' -Monkie King, Lego Monkie Kid™
body:
WARNING: Use this mod at your own risk, this is NOT a survival mod, this thing is made for experimental reasons and you can use to play around yourself or to fight your friends, make sure to not use this is a world you care about, since it can be very destructive.

Have you ever wanted to be Sun Wukong and battle your friends that have very op and annoying forge mods that have op gear and stuff that makes them invincible?, NO?, well I don't care, I made a mod that does just that, visually inspired by the cool but underrated 2d Lego™ series: Monkie Kid. The abilities are inspired by the popular chinese legend: Journey To The West.

This mod adds a way to convert yourself into The Great Sage Equal To Heaven himself and obliterate anyone who stands in your way, packed with an armor set, gear, and a fully fledged second phase, all within this silly mod.

## FEATURES
- **Building Block**
> - Mystic Stone (used to make a big rock where Sun Wukong will be born from, to do this, make a 3x3x3 cube with said block and leave a 2 block tall space inside for you to be in, after you do this, a small cutscene will take place [make sure you are standing inside the 2 block tall space before being sealed away in the stone], just wait until it's over to start the fight [It will totally look cool to your friends])
- **MISC Items**
> - Fun Value (This debug item, is given by commands and here is what it does: So, as Sun Wukong, you have a custom death animation [no way i'm making you inmortal, that would completely ruin the point of a fight] and other people who are not have a lame death animation, and if you are having a fight like, you against 3 players, before the fight right click the ''boss'' of them 3, so the fight would have a more impressive ending)
> - Inmortality x2 (Right click to be inmortal, this is experimental)
> - Pebble (Throw it)
> - Sleep Insect (Throw this to your oponents to make 'em sleep for a few seconds)
- **Foodstuff**
> - Inmortalitly Peach (If these didn't make you inmortal, they'd literally kill you, well, not actually, they won't kill you nor make you inmortal, but will regenerate you extremely fast)
- **Arsenal**
> - Phoenix-Feather Crown
> - Golden Chainmail
> - Golden Battle Skirt
> - Cloud-stepping shoes
> - Full Monkie King Armor Set (Has a lot of abilities)
> - Ruyi Jingu Bang (Right click to extend it and hit enemies from far away [1 of each 5 will have a giant attack], right click looking down to launch yourself into the air, shift+right click to parry [with a chance of doing a double parry that negates regeneration to the oponent], press Q to throw the staff [it will return])
> - Advance Gauntlet (There are no gauntlets in the legends, but for the purpose of not adding an inhumane ammount of keybinds, there will be gauntlets, this one allows the user to teleport upon right click, launching all entities in the radious of impact into the air, press Q to power up and do faster and stronger attacks)
> - Ember Gauntlet (press Q to do Wukong's Flaming Fist Of Fury!, [If you watched Lego Monkie Kid, you will undestand])
> - Frostmaw Gauntlet (press Q to freeze someone or something in place, once each 5 attacks will perform a special move: Snowgrave)
- **Abilities**
> - Ocasionally teleport when hit, negates damage
> - Can double jump mid-air
> - Can move fast
> - Golden Vision of Truth (Can reveal any entity nearby, including players [G])
> - Cloud Somersault (Can summon a cloud that can go really fast, will despawn in 10 seconds [Spacebar+Shift+Left Click])
> - Throw stone/mountain (Can throw a block of stone/mountain that will damage enemies nearby [Q with empty hand])
> - Stone spikes attack (Can impale anyone in a straigh line [shift+Q with empty hand])
> - Resize (Can make you small and normal size again [Z])
> - Clones (Can make 20 clones out of you own hair, they are really fast and can ocasionally throw staffs to their targets [C])
> - Invisibility (Make yourself invisible and invincible for a short period of time, this also causes the clones to stop following you [I])

If you haven't yet, check out Lego Monkie Kid, is a good show.
